summary: The document pertains to a recent update from the European Union regulator concerning the adjustment of Anti-Money Laundering (AML) reporting thresholds. The revised limit is now €5,000 and this change is effective immediately. It is crucial for the compliance team to update internal policies in line with this modification. Additionally, the finance department should be informed to revise the customer verification procedures accordingly.
